Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Action Pending Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Austin G. Bosarge of Turning Point Law (415-492-2041) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Shona L. Armstrong of Harper & Armstrong LLP (510-420-8455) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANTS JULIE LOUIS, LUKE HOLLAND, PATRICIA DOMINGUE, TERRYL DOMINGUE AND STONEWOOD KITCHEN & BATH'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay The Action Pending Arbitration is DENIED without prejudice. Defendants have not shown that Business and Professions Code 7085 requires that plaintiff's claims be resolved by arbitration. By stipulation of the parties in open forum, this action is stayed for 30 days. Moving party counsel, Ms. Shona Armstrong mustprepare and submit a [proposed] written order tracking the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
